# Addrika Fragrances — llms.txt

> Addrika is a premium Indian incense brand by Centsibl Traders Private Limited. We craft charcoal-free, low-smoke agarbatti, bambooless dhoop, and authentic Arabian bakhoor using ethically sourced ingredients. Our products are designed for daily puja, meditation, yoga, aromatherapy, and luxury home fragrance.

## Brand Identity
- Brand Name: Addrika (also known as Addrika Fragrances)
- Parent Company: Centsibl Traders Private Limited
- Website: https://centraders.com
- Category: Premium Natural Incense, Luxury Home Fragrance
- Founded: 2022
- Origin: India

## Key Differentiators
- Zero charcoal in all products — uses natural flower dust base
- Over 60% less smoke than traditional agarbatti
- Ethically sourced ingredients: pure essential oils, natural resins, aromatic herbs
- Bambooless dhoop range (no bamboo core)
- Premium Arabian bakhoor collection (Grated Omani Bakhoor, Yemeni Bakhoor Chips)
- 40-50 minute burn time per agarbatti stick
- Free shipping on orders above ₹499 across India

## Product Range

### Agarbatti (Incense Sticks with Bamboo Core)
- Kesar Chandan: Saffron and sandalwood blend, 50g/100g/200g, from ₹110
- Regal Rose: Premium rose fragrance, 50g/100g/200g, from ₹110
- Oriental Oudh: Exotic oud and amber, 50g/100g/200g, from ₹110
- Bold Bakhoor: Arabian bakhoor-inspired stick, 50g/100g/200g, from ₹110
- Mystical Meharishi: Meditative herbal blend, 50g/100g/200g, from ₹110
- Royal Kewda: Exotic pandanus flower, 50g, ₹110

### Bakhoor (Arabian Incense)
- Grated Omani Bakhoor: Traditional Omani-style grated resin, 20g, ₹249. Rated 4.9/5.
- Yemeni Bakhoor Chips: Aged oud chips with saffron and honey, 20g, ₹399. Rated 4.8/5.

### Dhoop (Bambooless Incense)
- Mystical Meharishi Bambooless Dhoop: Premium bambooless dhoop, 100g, ₹149

## Use Cases
- Daily puja and religious rituals
- Meditation and mindfulness practice
- Yoga studio fragrance
- Aromatherapy and stress relief
- Luxury home fragrance and ambiance
- Gifting for festivals (Diwali, Eid, Navratri)
- Premium incense for special occasions
